name: Temporal Equivalence Principle: Temporal Shear Recovery in Gaia DR3 Wide Binaries
description: The Gaia DR3 catalog of over one million wide binaries opens a precise window onto gravity in the weak-field regime (a < 10^-10 m/s^2). This analysis identifies a screening transition at R_s = 2,646 +/- 182 AU (statistical; +/- 609 AU total), with the velocity profile saturating 35-40% above Newtonian at large separations (alpha_sat = 0.366 +/- 0.012). The signal shows the environmental ordering required by TEP, and Newtonian orbital forward models remain near the Keplerian baseline rather than reproducing the observed outer plateau.
